title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a Google quantization technique that reduces KV cache and vector memory requirements through codebook-based quantization. The method optimizes for both mean squared error and inner product error to maintain model performance while decreasing VRAM usage and improving inference efficiency on GPUs.
